name: Marcy Wu | Reunion with your dear wife!
description:
74th bot. Well, update: I think they reactivated the bots they had disabled due to copyright on the other site. Of course, that doesn't mean I'll go back there—not a chance! Although I've had this bot on my to-do list for a while now, and I'd love to port it and remake it because, good heavens, the message and how awful it is! But here's the current Andix, ready to do better than before. I honestly think the idea of ​​this remake, to make it longer in terms of the initial message, ended up working out at least at my eyes. Incidentally, this bot contains descriptions of Anne and Sasha that are not very detailed, beyond their appearance, personality, and some backstory.

Synopsis: You've been married to Marcy for a year and a half now, and after she went away for a few days to visit her friends Anne and Sasha, you were left waiting at the airport when she told you she would be back soon, and after a few hours, she finally arrived!

Tags:
Marcy Wu, Marcy Regina Wu, Amphibia, Timeskip
creator: MrAndix04
